preamble: In some Na-Dene languages, particularly Tlingit, lateral affricates like [kʟ] (or [kɬ]) developed from velar stops in certain phonological environments, often involving specific vowel qualities or following labialization.

examples.note: Historical development of lateral affricates from velar stops.

sources: Maddieson, I., & Smith, C. L. (1996). The Phonetic Structure of Tlingit.
